ranges.label: Transaction Profile
ranges.description: Raw local activity pattern (amount, fees, time, inputs/outputs)

ranges.label: Network Context
ranges.description: Aggregated one-hop neighbor statistics (in/out-degree, neighbor activity)

ranges.label: Hidden Topological Patterns
ranges.description: Learned GATv2 graph-context embedding (not individually interpretable)

source: Weber et al. 2019 local/aggregate split, mapped to this project's V1-V166 (1-indexed) feature columns and the actual GATv2 embedding width (hidden_channels=16 x heads=8 = 128).
